rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §38.208 governs school epinephrine and respiratory distress medication policies. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Each school district, open-enrollment charter school, and private school may adopt and implement a policy regarding the maintenance, administration, and disposal of epinephrine delivery systems at each campus in the district or school.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns school health emergency medication policies and has no reference to property tax exemptions or homestead valuation.
